concept: I Paused My Game for This
title: I Paused My Game for This Funny Gamer Humor T-Shirt Gift for Gamers
description:
Gamers, unite! We've all been there—tearing through an epic campaign, perfectly in the zone—only to have real life rudely interrupt. This design says what your face already does, but with some added flair. Whether you’re grinding for XP or raging at your internet connection, this shirt is your instant mood accessory. 

Perfect for:
- Gamers who take their hobby VERY seriously.
- People tired of explaining why pausing a multiplayer game isn’t a thing.
- Gifting to your favorite streamer, dungeon crawler, or casual button-masher. 

DETAILS:
- Clean bold text reads: “I Paused My Game for This,” in a playful mixed font with subtle gaming iconography.
- Available in a full range of light and dark colors to match any style.
- Made-to-order with soft, comfortable materials to keep you cozy during those long gaming marathons.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
